typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_viha_input_file_name as string (),
	var_viha_input_folder as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT CAST(dss_lis_instance_id AS varchar(1)) + \'||\' + CAST (order_id AS varchar(20)) AS order_row_id 		, order_id  		, person_id AS patient_id 		, ordering_provider_id 		, copy_to_provider_1_id 		, copy_to_provider_2_id 		, copy_to_provider_3_id 		, \'VIHA\' AS hospital_code 		, dss_lis_instance_id  FROM lab.stg_viha_test_result',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		copy_to_provider_1_id as integer,
		order_row_id as string,
		copy_to_provider_2_id as integer,
		copy_to_provider_3_id as integer,
		patient_id as integer,
		hospital_code as string,
		dss_lis_instance_id as long,
		order_id as integer,
		ordering_provider_id as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		copy_to_provider_1_id,
		order_row_id,
		copy_to_provider_2_id,
		copy_to_provider_3_id,
		patient_id,
		hospital_code,
		dss_lis_instance_id,
		order_id,
		ordering_provider_id)) ~> OLEDBDestination
